title: cereus murillii
intro: Cereus murillii, also known as the Night-Blooming Cereus, is a species of cactus that belongs to the genus Cereus, characterized by its ability to bloom at night and produce vibrant, trumpet-shaped flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Cereus murillii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations.
